title: ABP v1 Core event envelope (Host -> Client)
description: Core validates only the event envelope. The set of kinds and each kind's `data` schema are defined by the negotiated, pinned World Profile (SPEC/abp-v1.md §5); clients MUST additionally validate `data` against that profile's `events[kind].data` schema.

kind.description: A key defined by the pinned profile's `events` map. Unknown kinds MUST be rejected.

seq.description: Global, per-session, monotonically increasing event sequence. The resume cursor (§4.3.2). Independent of any per-conversation sequence a profile defines.

data.description: Validated against the pinned profile's events[kind].data schema (closed, additionalProperties:false).
